name: ConteudoG
description: ConteudoG scraper for SkyStream Gen 2. v5: fixes Streamtape hostname/path junk (comxyza, get_vixyzadeo, xyzaid= params), adds dedicated Vinovo JWPlayer extractor, improves Voe JSON block parsing, fixes MxDrop wurl prefix, removes dead minochinos.com host, adds playmogo to XFS dispatcher.
